title: ClipForge render report v1
description: Telemetry written by bin/cf-ffmpeg render next to every output mp4. Captures duration math, encoder choice, two-pass wall times, splice plan metadata, per-junction quality gates (G1 sample-jump ratio, G2 spectral flatness, G3 RMS spike), and render-level warnings. Schema validated on every emit; failure exits non-zero.

render_mode.description: splice if edit.json carries a tighten_plan ref with cuts_count > 0; passthrough otherwise.

av_drift_ms.description: video_duration_ms - audio_duration_ms. Positive = video longer (typical, frame-grid quantization). Negative = audio longer (anomaly).

wall_ms.description: Wall-clock from ffmpeg spawn() to exit event, exclusive of pre/post I/O. Date.now() deltas.

junction_xfade_s.description: Forensic trail of the JUNCTION_XFADE_S constant value used for this render.

warnings_from_plan.description: Verbatim passthrough of tighten_plan.warnings. Renderer must copy without filtering; future plan fields are preserved.

junctions.description: One entry per cut junction in output-time order. Empty array on non-splice renders.

ratio.description: jump_with_xfade / jump_no_xfade. null when status is skipped_*.

kurtosis_no_xfade_narrow.description: Excess kurtosis of the diff signal s[i]-s[i-1] over the no-xfade synthesized 5ms (±2.5ms) window. Used by split-condition (b). Range: -2 (uniform/platykurtic) through 0 (Gaussian) up to ~1000+ (sharp single-sample click). >= 3.0 indicates outlier (click-like) character; below = smooth speech variation.

flatness_with_xfade_wide.description: Spectral flatness of rendered output's 80ms window around junction.

flatness_no_xfade_wide.description: Spectral flatness of synthesized no-xfade 80ms window from source.

warnings.description: Codes only, no per-junction messages. Documented codes: rms_intrinsic_amplitude_difference, junction_below_click_floor, junction_tonal_no_click.
Render-level warnings (filter_graph_length_near_limit, aac_priming_overhead, junction_too_short_for_xfade, etc.). Same shape as plan warnings.
